mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment functionality via API or UI. Batch 12 contains dashboard navigation pages (DashboardHPSmartPage, DashboardSideMenuPage), authentication page (HPIDPage), admin page (GeminiAdminPage), and landing page (LandingPage). None of these files contain printer enrollment methods, enrollment API helpers, or enrollment page objects. Printer enrollment functionality likely exists in other batches containing enrollment flow pages, printer management pages, or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription state verification via API. Batch 12 contains DashboardHPSmartPage with a subscription_state locator, but no API helper methods to verify subscription details or check for free months. API helpers for subscription verification likely exist in other batches containing API utility modules or subscription management helpers.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription status verification. Batch 12 contains DashboardHPSmartPage.subscription_state locator which could display status, but no methods to verify or assert the status value, and no API helpers to check subscription status programmatically. Subscription status verification methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or subscription management utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires clicking a pause plan button or link. Batch 12 does not contain any CIT modal page object, pause plan button locators, or pause instant ink link locators. DashboardHPSmartPage and DashboardSideMenuPage contain various dashboard navigation elements but no pause plan functionality. The pause plan UI elements and interaction methods likely exist in other batches containing plan management pages or subscription control pages.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Encapsulates all UI elements and user interactions for the dashboard side navigation menu. Provides locators for menu items and submenu items, and intelligent click methods that automatically handle parent menu expansion, mobile layout menu expansion, and retry logic.
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: This page object is relevant to steps 1 and 4 which require navigation to the Print and Payment History page. DashboardSideMenuPage provides the click_print_history() method and print_history_menu_link locator that navigate to the Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink section. While the test case does not explicitly mention using the side menu for navigation, this is the standard navigation pattern in the dashboard interface.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Print and Payment History submenu item under HP Instant Ink that navigates to the history page showing past print jobs and payment transactions.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: This locator targets the Print and Payment History menu item in the side navigation. Steps 1 and 4 both require navigating to the Print and Payment History page. This locator can be used to click the menu item to perform that navigation.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Subscription state indicator element that displays the current status of the HP Instant Ink subscription. Uses multiple selector options to match different page variations.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: This locator targets the subscription state indicator which could potentially be used to verify subscription status as required by preconditions 2 and 3. However, this is on the dashboard page, not the Print and Payment History page where the test executes. The locator is noted here for reference but may not be directly usable in this test context.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Clicks the Print and Payment History menu item in the side navigation to navigate to the print and payment history page. Calls _click_with_instant_ink_expansion with print_history_menu_link to handle mobile menu expansion and parent HP Instant Ink menu expansion if needed. This method provides a simple interface for test scripts to navigate to the history page.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: This method directly performs the navigation action required in steps 1 and 4: 'Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink'. The method handles all complexity of menu expansion (parent menu and mobile menu) automatically, making it the ideal method to use for this navigation step.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.

Batch 12 does not contain the PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object or any page load verification methods for that page. Page load verification methods likely exist in other batches containing the PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object or base page utilities.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 1 requires the URL or navigation path to Print and Payment History page. The click_print_history() method encapsulates this navigation, so no separate URL constant is needed when using this method.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

These components likely exist in other batches containing the PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this verification step.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Step 3 requires the value 32 for days to shift. This is a hardcoded test data value. No constants found in batch 12 for this value.

test_case_mappings.batch_analysis_summary: Batch 12 contains 5 page objects: DashboardHPSmartPage (dashboard elements, footer links, subscription state), DashboardSideMenuPage (side menu navigation with intelligent expansion handling), GeminiAdminPage (admin refund page), HPIDPage (authentication and account creation), and LandingPage (public landing page with extensive marketing content). For test case C44873414 which tests the Billing Cycle Period card on Print and Payment History page, batch 12 provides LIMITED coverage. The only relevant component found is DashboardSideMenuPage.click_print_history() method which handles navigation to the Print and Payment History page required in steps 1 and 4. This method intelligently handles parent menu expansion and mobile layout, making it the ideal navigation method. However, batch 12 does NOT contain the PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object itself, nor any of the specific elements tested in this test case: billing cycle card locators, progress bar locators (complimentary and additional pages), tooltip locators, page usage text locators, info icon locators, or any verification methods for these elements. Batch 12 also does not contain API helpers for time manipulation (step 3), print job registration (steps 10, 12), subscription state verification (preconditions 2-3), printer enrollment (precondition 1), or pause plan functionality (precondition 4). The test case requires components from other batches containing the PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object, API helper modules, test utilities for time manipulation and print simulation, and visual/responsive testing utilities. Batch 12 provides navigation capability only, covering 2 out of 21 steps partially (steps 1 and 4 action dimension only, not verification dimension).
